page_metadata.bioconda__summary: Ultrafast, lightweight, scalable genome assembly polishing, and SNV detection & annotation
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: ultra fast, scalable genome assembly polishing and snv detection
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Scalable genomics application for polishing genome assembly drafts. It simplifies polishing and "haploidization" of gene and genome sequences with its re-usable Bloom filter design.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Scalable genomics application for polishing genome assembly drafts. It simplifies polishing and "haploidization" of gene and genome sequences with its re-usable Bloom filter design.
